mapper.sql: id, name, group_id, group_name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
c.id, c.name, c.group_id, COALESCE(g.name, c.group_name) AS group_name, c.description, c.sort_order, c.enabled, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, c.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_category c LEFT JOIN blog_category_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM blog_category c LEFT JOIN blog_category_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL
AND c.enabled = #{enabled}
AND g.enabled = 1
ORDER BY g.sort_order ASC, c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_category c INNER JOIN blog_category_group g ON c.group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL AND g.enabled = 1 WHERE c.name = #{name} AND c.enabled = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_category WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_category
id, name, group_id, group_name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{name}, #{groupId}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_category SET name = #{name}, group_id = #{groupId}, group_name = #{groupName}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_category (id, name, group_id, group_name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{groupId}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, group_id = #{groupId}, group_name = #{groupName}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
mapper.select: SELECT group_name AS `name`, COUNT(1) AS categoryCount, GROUP_CONCAT(name ORDER BY sort_order ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS categoryNames FROM blog_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND group_name IS NOT NULL AND group_name != '' GROUP BY group_name ORDER BY group_name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_category SET group_name = #{newName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_name = #{oldName} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_category SET group_name = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_name = #{groupName} AND deleted_at IS NULL
